title: The Reunion Where Two Memories Fuse
tagline: A family archive that physically cannot lose a story — even a disagreement.
holy_shit: A family archive that physically cannot lose a story — even a disagreement is kept forever as a parallel dimension instead of deleted, and every version is immutable and recoverable.
powered_by: the Dream Catcher merge (append-only; contradictions become alternate frames; NOTHING IS LOST)
agent_scenario: When two datasets must merge without ever losing or overwriting a record — conflicts preserved as alternate frames, append-only.
author: kody-w + Claude
